title: Rich Roasted Middle Eastern Cannellini Beans Upside-Down Maqluba
description: A cultural twist on traditional cannellini beans, featuring roasted Mediterranean flavors and an upside-down presentation. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cannellini beans, olive oil, onion, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the bean mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Pour the lemon juice and honey over the bean mixture.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
While the beans are roasting, prepare the papillote by cutting a piece of aluminum foil to fit over the top of the baking dish.
After 25 minutes, remove the dish from the oven and carefully place the papillote over the top of the beans.
Return the dish to the oven and continue to roast for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the beans are tender and the papillote is crispy.
Remove the dish from the oven and carefully flip the papillote over the top of the beans, creating an upside-down presentation.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
